creator: tatsuki_makino@hotmail.com
text:
... environment variables may not be so relevant.
However, we continue to look at things that are less relevant but often missed.

First, make sure that the file named qt.conf is not found anywhere in ${LOCALBASE}.
Then reinstall qt5-qmake. It should be built in the cleanest possible environment or from official package.
After that, rebuild qt5-gui and qt5-*.
